prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约277→364→681→792→1286，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约1009名；2024年甘肃省高考改革（理科→物理类）后位次加速后移，2025年基准约 1286名；本省招生计划2021–2023年10–12人，2024–2025年增至19人；2026年计划24人，较2025年扩招约26.3%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。 复旦大学（含上海医学院）为985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜2026年排名第5，属全国顶尖层次；医学院临床医学、公共卫生与预防医学等学科实力位居全国 前列。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与学校管理类舆情；但抖音热度总排名第4（高热），综合热度超千万，短视频平台曝光度极高，报考关注度 不减；2025年声誉偏正面（科研成果），整体舆情对报考影响中性偏弱；临床医学（A）、公共卫生与预防医学（A+）、药学（A）、护理学（A-）、生物学（A+ ）等均为顶尖学科，与招生专业（临床医学、基础医学、预防医学、药学）高度对应，学科实力对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续高热（2023年he at_index 76.03，2024年70.19），药学专业热度平稳；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数218700人，按近年物理类占比约66.6%估算约145700人，较2025年物理类121443人增长约20%，考生规模 扩大加剧竞争；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，非甘肃省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；该校在甘肃省招生占比约1.8%–2 .2%（2024–2025年），属外省普通水平，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1286名、2026年扩招26.3%的缓解效应、甘肃省考生规模增长约20%的加剧效 应、临床医学持续高热及声誉偏负面等因素，扩招与考生增长基本对冲，声誉偏负面略降温；预测2026年最低位次约1469名，区间1293–1645名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（含卓越临床医师班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 基础医学（含尚医拔尖班）
- 药学（含药学拔尖班、药学产教融合班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（含预防医学拔尖班、预防医学-人工智能、预防医学-公共事业管理双学士学位）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1293–1645名内，建议以二档基础医学、药学为主力报考方向，一档临床医学可冲刺但录取概率较低，三档预防医学作为稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（1293 以内）可重点冲刺临床医学王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately shifted from 277 → 364 → 681 → 792 → 1286, with a continuous backward movement for 5 consecutive years, accumulating a shift of about 1009 places; after the 2024 Gansu Province college entrance examination reform (Science → Physics Category), the ranking accelerated its backward movement, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 1286; the provincial enrollment plan was 10–12 students from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 19 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 24 students, an expansion of about 26.3% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and has a certain alleviating effect on competition. Fudan University (including Shanghai Medical College) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the national top tier; the medical college's clinical medicine, public health and preventive medicine, and other disciplines are among the top in the country.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management public opinion; but the overall Douyin heat ranking is 4th (high heat), with comprehensive heat exceeding tens of millions, extremely high exposure on short video platforms, and undiminished application attention; the 2025 reputation was somewhat positive (scientific research achievements), with overall public opinion having a neutral to weak impact on applications; clinical medicine (A), public health and preventive medicine (A+), pharmacy (A), nursing (A-), biology (A+), and other disciplines are all top-tier, highly corresponding to the enrollment majors (clinical medicine, basic medicine, preventive medicine, pharmacy), and the strength of the disciplines strongly attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine major continues to be highly popular (2023 heat_index 76.03, 2024 70.19), pharmacy major popularity is stable; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province general college entrance examination is 218,700, estimated at about 145,700 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 66.6%, an increase of about 20% compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 121,443, with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying competition; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, not a local university in Gansu Province, with no provincial enrollment preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu Province is about 1.8%–2.2% (2024–2025), which is at an average level for out-of-province universities, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1286, the alleviating effect of a 26.3% expansion in 2026, the intensifying effect of a candidate pool growth of about 20% in Gansu Province, the sustained high popularity of clinical medicine, and the somewhat negative reputation, the expansion and candidate growth basically offset each other, with the somewhat negative reputation slightly cooling interest; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 1469, with a range of 1293–1645.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (including Outstanding Clinical Physician Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Basic Medicine (including Shangyi Top Talent Class)
- Pharmacy (including Pharmacy Top Talent Class, Pharmacy Industry-Education Integration Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine (including Preventive Medicine Top Talent Class, Preventive Medicine-Artificial Intelligence, Preventive Medicine-Public Administration Dual Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 1293–1645, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Basic Medicine and Pharmacy as the main application directions; Tier 1 Clinical Medicine can be attempted as a reach but has a lower admission probability; Tier 3 Preventive Medicine serves as a safe backup; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1293), one can focus on reaching for the top Clinical Medicine major.
